centralized_service.description: Centralizes all Google Maps JavaScript API, Places API, Directions API, and Geocoding API requests. No UI component may call the Google Maps SDK or web endpoints directly.

request_caching.description: Significantly minimizes Maps API quota usage by reusing responses within a 24-hour window.

request_throttling.description: Prevents rapid, high-frequency requests when typing in autocomplete search bars.

offline_resilience.mechanism: Navigator offline state check + Cache lookup
offline_resilience.description: Funnels queries to cache when offline; falls back to friendly standardized errors instead of app crashes.

retry_logic.description: Retries transient network or server errors automatically with staggered delays.

standardized_response_model.description: Enforces consistent type signatures across all service consumers.

atomic_writes.scope: Subcollection syncing & login migrations in src/App.tsx
atomic_writes.description: Ensures all multiple Firestore address write operations are completely atomic and batch-committed.
